calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.
David Stephen Zalob, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Philip Zaragoza, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Corazon Trissel.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on July 22, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Philip Zaragoza, and against the Defaulted Defendant Corazon Trissel as follows:

Damages/Principal - $147,652.77.
Prejudgment Interest - $26,779.45.
Attorney's Fees - $9,786.25.
Costs - $384.50, for a total in the amount of $184,602.97.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court no later than October 10, 2008.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Set For Trial On Oct-06-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
